ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project or repository */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project or repository */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project or repository */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Short name of the file */,
  "long_name" TEXT /* Full path and name of the file */,
  "parent_id" TEXT /* Reference to the parent file or directory */,
  "mc_cc" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity of the file */,
  "cloc" INTEGER /* Comment lines of code (CLOC) in the file */,
  "lloc" INTEGER /* Logical lines of code (LLOC) in the file */,
  "number_of_developer_commits" INTEGER /* Number of developer commits for the file */,
  "number_of_committers" INTEGER /* Number of unique committers for the file */,
  "number_of_previous_fixes" INTEGER /* Number of previous fixes for the file */,
  "number_of_previous_modifications" INTEGER /* Number of previous modifications for the file */,
  "number_of_bugs" INTEGER /* Number of bugs associated with the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., java, python, txt) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the file was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_hierarchy" (
  "hierarchy_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each hierarchy entry */,
  "file_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "parent_id" TEXT /* Reference to the parent file or directory */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the file in the hierarchy (depth from the root) */,
  "path" TEXT /* Full path of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hierarchy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_hierarchy_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_hierarchy_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committers" (
  "committer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each committer */,
  "committer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the committer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the committer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the committer (e.g., developer, project manager, QA engineer) */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the committer was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the committer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "file_id" TEXT /* ID of the file the commit is associated with */,
  "committer_id" TEXT /* ID of the committer */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message of the commit */,
  "lines_added" INTEGER /* Number of lines added in the commit */,
  "lines_deleted" INTEGER /* Number of lines deleted in the commit */,
  "number_of_files_changed" INTEGER /* Number of files changed in the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_committer_id FOREIGN KEY ("committer_id") REFERENCES committers ("committer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bugs" (
  "bug_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "file_id" TEXT /* ID of the file the bug is associated with */,
  "bug_title" TEXT /* Title of the bug */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bug (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* ID of the user assigned to resolve the bug */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was reported */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the bug (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the bug (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES committers ("committer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "version_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "file_id" TEXT /* ID of the file the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  "commit_id" TEXT /* ID of the commit that created this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" TEXT /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES committers ("committer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES committers ("committer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES committers ("committer_id")
)
